name: Gemini CLI

latest_major_update.comment: Google points CLI users toward Antigravity (agy CLI) for the latest standalone CLI surface.

rules.comment: Uses GEMINI.md context files. Location: no public disk folder/file location found in docs reviewed.

skills.comment: Extensible through tools/extensions rather than the same SKILL.md contract. Location: no public disk folder/file location found in docs reviewed.

mcp_servers.comment: Supports MCP servers. Location: no public disk folder/file location found in docs reviewed.

custom_commands.comment: Supports commands. Location: no public disk folder/file location found in docs reviewed.

goal_command.comment: Deprecated Gemini CLI surface; no documented `/goal`. Google points CLI users to Antigravity, which also lacks a `/goal` command in public docs.

continue.comment: Supports continuing a previous session through resume/latest-session workflows.

notes: Deprecated: Google points new CLI work to Antigravity. Kept as an explicit agent-launch option, but excluded from random selection in this repo. Headless/scripting mode only; no published agent embed SDK.

pricing.value: Free (Apache-2.0), Gemini API usage billed separately
pricing.comment: Gemini CLI is open source (Apache-2.0). API usage billed through Google AI Studio or Vertex AI.

some_free_usage.comment: Gemini CLI documents a free tier when signing in with a Google account.

can_use_other_subscriptions.comment: Gemini CLI can use quotas from Gemini Code Assist editions, and also supports API-key pay-as-you-go.

hosted_agent.comment: Local CLI tool backed by Google Gemini API.

transcripts.comment: Location: transcript/session disk storage was not found in public docs reviewed.

keyboard_shortcuts.comment: Research needed. Check official documentation for keybinding customization options.

theme_customization.comment: Research needed. Check for theme/appearance customization options.

auto_save.comment: Research needed. Check for auto-save or session persistence features.

debugging_output.comment: Research needed. Check for debug mode or verbose logging options.

context_window.comment: Research needed. Check for configurable context length or token limits.

code_formatting.comment: Research needed. Check for formatter/linter integration or auto-format options.

git_integration.comment: Research needed. Check for git command support or version control integration.

performance_mode.comment: Research needed. Check for caching, optimization, or resource management settings.

ui_customization.comment: Research needed. Check for UI layout, sidebar, or panel customization.
